# Pull Request: New Game Profile

## Game Information
- **Game Name**: <!-- e.g., PUBG Mobile -->
- **Package Name**: <!-- e.g., com.tencent.ig -->
- **Genre**: <!-- FPS / MOBA / ARPG / Sports / etc -->
- **Target Screen Size**: <!-- e.g., 12.2" tablet (2800x1840) -->

## Profile Details
- **Buttons Count**: <!-- e.g., 23 -->
- **Gyro Enabled**: <!-- Yes / No -->
- **Anti-ban Enabled**: <!-- Yes / No -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I created my profile file in `src/communityProfiles/` (e.g., `myGame.ts`)
- [ ] I imported my profile in `src/communityProfiles/index.ts`
- [ ] I used the template from `_template.ts` as starting point
- [ ] My profile `id` is unique (not duplicated with existing profiles)
- [ ] My `packageName` matches the actual Android app package
- [ ] Button coordinates use percentages (0-100) for auto-scaling
- [ ] I tested the profile on my device (if possible)
- [ ] I did NOT modify any files outside `src/communityProfiles/`

## Profile File Name
<!-- e.g., src/communityProfiles/pubgMobile.ts -->

## Additional Notes
<!-- Any extra info about your profile, special features, etc -->
